title: Multi-clause where with pinned params and runtime functions
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.registered_between/2` that takes two `DateTime` values and returns users whose `inserted_at` is between them, inclusive. Use `where: u.inserted_at >= ^start_ts and u.inserted_at <= ^end_ts`. Order by `inserted_at asc`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Two pins and a range check — more moving parts than easy but mechanical.
